Bash(node -e "const Database = require\(''better-sqlite3''\); const db = new Database\(''C:/Users/lukas/AppData/Roaming/kopirovacka/kopirovacka.db'', {readonly:true}\); const rows = db.prepare\(''SELECT id, content_type, substr\(preview,1,60\) as preview, char_count, created_at FROM clips ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10''\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(rows, null, 2\)\); db.close\(\);")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "Add-Type -MemberDefinition ''[DllImport\(""user32.dll""\)] public static extern void keybd_event\(byte bVk, byte bScan, uint dwFlags, UIntPtr dwExtraInfo\);'' -Name Win32 -Namespace API; Write-Host ''keybd_event loaded OK''")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "Add-Type -MemberDefinition ''[DllImport\(""user32.dll""\)] public static extern void keybd_event\(byte bVk, byte bScan, uint dwFlags, UIntPtr dwExtraInfo\);'' -Name Win32 -Namespace API; [API.Win32]::keybd_event\(0x11, 0, 0, [UIntPtr]::Zero\); [API.Win32]::keybd_event\(0x56, 0, 0, [UIntPtr]::Zero\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 50; [API.Win32]::keybd_event\(0x56, 0, 2, [UIntPtr]::Zero\); [API.Win32]::keybd_event\(0x11, 0, 2, [UIntPtr]::Zero\); Write-Host ''Paste simulated''")

Bash(node -e "const { uIOhook, UiohookKey } = require\(''uiohook-napi''\); console.log\(''OK'', typeof uIOhook, Object.keys\(UiohookKey\).slice\(0,10\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { UiohookKey } = require\(''uiohook-napi''\); const keys = [''Semicolon'',''Quote'',''Comma'',''Period'',''Slash'',''Minus'',''Equal'',''Backquote'',''BracketLeft'',''BracketRight'',''Backslash'']; keys.forEach\(k => console.log\(k, UiohookKey[k]\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { UiohookKey } = require\(''uiohook-napi''\); const letters = ''ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ''.split\(''''\); letters.forEach\(l => { const k = ''Key''+l; if\(UiohookKey[k]\) console.log\(l, UiohookKey[k]\) }\)")
